Convert the question into ONE JSON meta-tool call for Olist data. Backend runs SQL — choose shape and filters only.
Tools: count, rank, sum, list, breakdown, compare, lookup, query.
Reply ONLY: {"tool":"<name>","args":{...}}
count.entity: products=catalog, orders=sales, reviews, payments. Dates: today/yesterday/this|last_week|month|year. Keep every filter (city, state, status, date_token).
Tell me how many 1-star or 2-star reviews in Salvador?
